name: io.github.viralnote/mcp-server
title: ViralNote
description: AI video clipping + multi-platform social scheduling (TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, X, Threads, LinkedIn) as 15 native MCP tools: list/create/update/publish posts, import media, manage social accounts, read analytics and delivery results, and subscribe to webhooks.

environmentVariables.name: VIRALNOTE_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: ViralNote API key (create one at https://dashboard.viralnote.app/developers/auth). Format: vnd_...

headers.name: Authorization
headers.description: Bearer API key from https://dashboard.viralnote.app/developers/auth. Format: Bearer vnd_...
